missions.title: Optics - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering reflection, spherical mirrors, mirror formula and more.

microtargets.title: Reflection
mustKnowFacts: Reflection is a fundamental subtopic of Optics.
Crucial to understand the principles governing Reflection for NEET.
commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Reflection during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for Reflection.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify structures related to Reflection.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Reflection.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain the core concept behind Reflection.
What is a common trap associated with Reflection?
